name: Diet Blueberry Bread Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the sugar, cornstarch, diet sweetener, and orange peel in a bowl, pressing out all lumps.
2. Add the blueberries to a 6-cup shallow casserole lightly sprayed with non-stick vegetable cooking spray.
3. Pour the sugar mixture into the casserole, add lemon juice, and toss well to mix.
4. Use a potato masher to lightly mash the blueberries; set aside.
5. Butter one side of the bread slices, stack them, and cut into 1/2-inch cubes.
6. Add the cubed bread to the casserole and toss well to mix.
7. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes. Remove from oven, add evaporated milk, and stir well to mix.
8. Return to the oven and bake for an additional 15 minutes uncovered.
9. Serve warm, topping with a little whole milk if desired.
